185.reason: [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, the program outputs the error to error.txt but does not stop further processing. According to the problem description, for an erroneous source program, the program should detect errors and output the line number and error type code, but it should not continue lexical analysis and output tokens. However, the current code continues parsing after detecting the error, which may lead to incorrect output. Additionally, the error output format uses "lineNum + " a\n"" which may have formatting issues, but the main logical error is that the program does not terminate or skip the erroneous token properly.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When a single '&' is encountered, the program outputs the error to error.txt but does not stop further processing. According to the problem description, for an erroneous source program, the program should detect errors and output the line number and error type code, but it should not continue lexical analysis and output tokens. However, the current code continues parsing after detecting the error, which may lead to incorrect output. Additionally, the error output format uses "lineNum + " a\n"" which may have formatting issues, but the main logical error is that the program does not terminate or skip the erroneous token properly.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing content.charAt(present + 1) may cause StringIndexOutOfBoundsException when '&' is the last character in the input]
